timeline.title: The Day It All Began
timeline.description: Our official besties anniversary! We decided that no matter what life throws at us, we will stick together as partners-in-crime.

timeline.title: Gokul's Birthday Celebration
timeline.description: Nivetha planned a surprise chocolate cake and custom card. It was one of the most heartwarming birthday celebrations ever!

timeline.title: Besties Day Road Trip
timeline.description: Celebrated International Besties Day with an amazing drive to the beach. Took tons of videos and laughed till our stomachs hurt.
